title: ligularia virgaurea var. oligocephala
intro: Ligularia virgaurea var. oligocephala, also known as the dwarf fleabane or dwarf ligularia, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ligularia virgaurea var. oligocephala include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
